Bearish.reasoning: Calm oversold condition in downtrend — ATR filter excludes volatile days

Neutral.entry_condition: Close > SMA_20 * 0.99 and MACD_hist > -150 and RSI2 > 30 and RSI2 < 60
Neutral.exit_condition: Close < SMA_20 * 0.98 or RSI2 > 70 or RSI > 70
Neutral.reasoning: Entry when price near SMA_20 with MACD not deeply negative and RSI2 in middle range

Bullish.entry_condition: Close < SMA_20 and RSI2 < 30 and MACD_hist > 0
Bullish.reasoning: Entering on pullbacks in confirmed uptrend with oversold RSI2 and positive momentum

Volatile.reasoning: Mean reversion in volatile market with RSI2 below 30 and ATR capped for risk
